government.
Saturn & Neptune : good aspects : a period of spiritual development in the study of occult
science.
Bad aspects: gives bad results to places Saturn occupies & tenets. It is a bad period of destruction
and losses.
Hershel / Uranus :
If Hershel is afflicted , i.e. if it makes bad aspects with Sun, Moon, 10th , Ascendent, Mars, etc.
then it gives sudden developments,dissensions, separation, break in love affairs & marriage, etc.
When it makes good aspects with other planets & points, then it gives authority and importance,
sudden wealth and progress. In a chart that has inclination to intellectual development, and if it is
trine to Ascendant, 3rd, 9th or 11th or trine to natal moon , natal Mercury, at that time the native
develops intellectually and succeeds with new imagination and thoughts. When trine to an
